candidate_methods.name: candidate method
candidate_methods.rationale: Explain why the method matches the property, scale and assumptions.
limitations: Document domain, model-form and numerical limitations.

convergence_checks: Define method-appropriate numerical and model convergence.
uncertainty_analysis: Separate parameter, model-form and numerical uncertainty.
physical_validation: Define benchmark, experiment, conservation or limiting-case checks.
acceptance_criteria: Converged, physically consistent and answers the scientific question.
human_approval_points: Approve method, assumptions and resources before execution.
